textByHash.3b93d1c3fcb6abe035853a5384fc477512c9087d: Is it here? Is it there? Is it elsewhere?
textByHash.7461af74a544fce303119c6452530465afbe5085: Oh yes. This one here - she is calm and boring. She stays here all the time. She doesn't like to move, but her sister is fidgety and refuses to stay in the same place for more than half an hour.
textByHash.0653475b84a4ed9ef1e9f31798feb7e450c4e400: Oh well. I don't know what you humans call these places. Let me show you.
textByHash.fa9df8666900533bf37cd24963c54f233c6a5433: Oh she's asleep at the moment. I'm sure she'll go somewhere in the next half an hour though.
textByHash.ecb48b14ab9f3e7dec38c15a536af212b2f0f453: I cannot show you this gate's sister on this world.
